text:
Last week, I woke up with an odd feeling. I decided to go for a walk. I'd just reach the corner when I noticed a man chasing a small elephant.

"What's up with that guy?" I wondered.

"He could just call it off," I thought.

I watched it run down the street.

"He could start a charity."

"Would he?" I pondered.

I decided against feeding it.

"I don't think that's really ethical."

I'd walk on.

Afterward, I went for sushi.

It was great. I had some special mayo.

"Ah yeah, that will do."<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
